items.question: Do I have to change transfer type between the two stops?
items.answer: Sometimes — it depends which islands you pick. We always confirm the inter-island transfer and its cost as part of your one total price, so there's no separate booking for you to arrange.

items.question: Is luggage handled between the guesthouse and the resort?
items.answer: Yes — the inter-island transfer we arrange includes your luggage. You won't need to manage separate pickups.

items.question: Can families or kids do a Combo trip?
items.answer: Yes — many families like starting on a local island (lower cost, easy activities) before finishing at a family-friendly resort with a kids' club.

items.question: Which order should we do it in — guesthouse first or resort first?
items.answer: Most people prefer ending on the resort so the trip finishes on the most relaxing note, but it works either way — tell us your preference and we'll build the itinerary around it.
